name: Nordic Smith Ivaldi
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>極</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>工</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>イーヴァルディ
desc: If you control an "Aesir" or "Nordic" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Nordic Relic" card from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Nordic Smith Ivaldi" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control an "Aesir" or "Nordic" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Nordic Relic" card from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Nordic Smith Ivaldi" once per turn.
eff: If you control an "Aesir" or "Nordic" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Nordic Relic" card from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Nordic Smith Ivaldi" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
